title: Crossed (DMC)
description: (WIP) This mod plans to introduce DMC-like elements into Minecrft
body:
**This Project is discontinued**



This mod is WIP (current version - 0.0.2)

Bringing game mechanics, items, ~~and enemies~~ from hack and slash games and more into Minecraft

**Currently adds**

(Game Mechanics) - Sky Star, High Roller, Air Combos, Stinger, Dash
                                
(Items) - Shlamake + Charged version, SwishySharpStick, Dao
                                
(Blocks) - Charging station

(Entities) - Dummy

Game Mechanics:

**Sky Star** - Basically double jump, uses a counter that resets when the player touches the ground, currently the counter is set to 2, the counter shrinks by 1 every time the Sky Star Key is pressed.

**High Roller** - Ctrl+right click an entity with item with the tooltype 'Sword' to perform High Roller, it deals no damage and adds 0.7  y velocity (around 3 blocks) to the player and the target and surounding entities.

**Air Combos** - When the player attacks while in air or the target is in the air and gets attacked then y 0.4 velocity ( half block) is applied.

**Stinger** - When an item in the category "sword" is held, Shift + Right Click couses the player to lounch forward and damage all entities around the player for 400 ms. Base damage is 3. Stinger resets when the player touches the ground.

**Dash** - When the Dash Key is pressed, the player gains angular velocity and 0.4 y velocity. Dash resets when the player touches the ground.

Items:

**Shlamake** - A shulker themed hammer, 0.8 attack speed, 10 damage and 2541 durability, can be crafted with 4 Shulker Shells, 1 End Stone and 2 Sticks. A charged version can be crafted at the charging station when a Shlamake is put into slot 1 and End Crystal into slot 2.

**Dao** - A sword with lower attack speed (1.4) but higher damage (7) than an Iron Sword. Made in the Smithing Table with an Iron Sword and a Lapis Block

**SwishySharpStick** - A quick sword with 1.8 speed and 6 damage, gives Speed 1 effect while held. Made at a Smithing Table with an Iron Sword and Redstone Block

Blocks:

**Charging Station** - Used only for the Charged Shlamake atm, made using 3 Shulker Shells in the top row and the rest filled with End Bricks

Entities:

**Dummy** - Has 100 health and no AI

**Compatability:**

~~**Better combat** - Items have custom combos and attributes.~~

Currently, Ive been modding for 3 weeks and this is the result (with ample help from MCreator)

I plan to update every week
